string.text:
The M67 fragmentation grenade is a widely used hand grenade employed by military forces worldwide. It is a compact, handheld explosive device consisting of a spherical body made of steel and filled with a high-explosive filler. The grenade features a distinctive ribbed texture to enhance grip and stability. Equipped with a safety lever and a pull-pin ignition system, the M67 is designed for safe handling until deployed. When activated, it produces a powerful explosion, causing the outer casing to fragment into deadly shrapnel that is propelled in all directions. The M67's effective blast radius and lethal fragmentation make it a formidable weapon in combat scenarios, enabling troops to neutralize enemy personnel and disrupt enemy positions with devastating effect.
 %c[ui_gray_3]CHARACTERISTICS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast power: %c[ui_gray_1]medium
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Blast radius: %c[ui_gray_1]10 m
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Avg. number of fragments: %c[ui_gray_1]200 (small shrapnels)
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Explosion delay: %c[ui_gray_1]3.5 seconds
